default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential engagement for Marcel's company to provide AI-powered content creation services for Reddit's business marketing website.](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company uses AI to generate high-quality content at scale, including research, outlines, and full articles](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [They can adapt their process to leverage Reddit's existing content/tone or create a new distinct section](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Initial kickoff meeting tentatively scheduled for July 9th, with content calibration when Laura returns from vacation in early August](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Potential to expand beyond content to other areas like social media, paid ads, personal branding later on](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Process Overview

  - [Kickoff meeting to align on goals, audience, existing assets](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Competitive research and building content workflows in parallel](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Iterative content calibration process to nail tone/voice](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Publish initial content, then refine processes](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Can handle CMS integration or manual publishing as needed](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

### Contracting & Kickoff

  - [Laura to send over SOW based on pricing provided](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [Tentative kickoff meeting scheduled for July 9th](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
  - [Laura's team can provide inputs before her vacation July 15-29](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Content calibration when Laura returns in early August](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)

### Leveraging Existing Content

  - [Can use articles the other agency writes in July to calibrate tone](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Potentially use AI to enhance outlines/angles for August articles](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Avoid rework by aligning on direction before writing](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)

### Expansion Opportunities

  - [Social media posts summarizing Reddit conversations](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2659.0)
  - [Paid search ad copy and site link optimization](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2684.0)
  - [Personal branding for executives](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2735.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Laura to initiate contracting process](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2928.0)
  - [Schedule tentative kickoff meeting for July 9th](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2949.0)
  - [Laura's team to provide existing inputs before her vacation](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2957.0)
  - [Reconvene for content calibration when Laura returns end of July](https://fathom.video/share/eBQo_4mw6jgqEuKawu1rsutEvqip88hU?tab=summary&timestamp=2972.0)

action_items.description: Update SOW template, send to Marcel, and start contracting process by sending SOW to legal team to schedule tentative kickoff call for week of July 9th
